# Contents

- Protocol Objectives

- Raw data from Tensiometer Protocol

- Data Consolidation from all locations and addition of new columns

- Exploratory data analysis 

    - Overall data summary
    
    - Visualization of time series data

- Discussion about statistical analysis
  


<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/restricted.PNG" width="100px" align="right"></div>


# SSC Tensiometer Protocol - Comparison between SSC and TALL systems


<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/emea_md_logo_3.PNG" width="50px" align="right"></div>
 
<div class="logos"><img src="/mnt/images/RZ_EMEA_Sign_Claim_Screen_RGB_on_white (1) (1).png" width="100px" align="right"></div>


- **Objective**: To compare the hydric potential (HPOT) levels at different soil depths between the two hybrid systems of interest - SSC 40cm VS Tall 80cm row spacing.


-SSC 40cm: **EZ5936 & Densité 3 : 120,000 plt/ha & 40cm narrow inter row spacing**    

-Tall 80cm: **DKC5182 & Densité - 85,000 plt/ha & 80cm conventional inter row spacing**  

# Raw data from Tensiometer Protocol

Same analysis as previously done (https://bayergroup.sharepoint.com/:u:/r/sites/ProjectManagmentTool/Project Library 2025/Preceon water management trials/Trials_France/Tensiometer_trials/results/france_tensiometer_analysis (2).html?csf=1&web=1&e=YUca6e)  

The stress periods for analysis are indicated in an Excel tab (file_indication_tensiometers_2025; stress periods)  

Important! Remember that each modality (S40 and T80) has three tensiometers for each depth.

So, for example, to find the kPa value for S40 at 30 cm, you need to average the three tensiometers indicated in the spreadsheet (file_indication_tensiometers_2025).

Example: kPa for S40 at 30 cm SSC6 = average (L70148B; L70144D; L701492)



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=5, fig.width=10}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lmerTest)
library(multcompView)
library(readxl)
library(plotly)
library(lubridate)
#library(dygraphs)

#install.packages("lmerTest")
#install.packages("multcompView")

#DT::datatable(head(start_flex,100), filter="top")

fichier = read_excel("/mnt/data/france_tensiometer_2025/file_indication_tensiometers_2025.xlsx")

DT::datatable(fichier)


fichier_1 = fichier

names(fichier_1)[5] = "tensiometer_id"
names(fichier_1)[1] = "trial"
names(fichier_1)[3] = "density"
names(fichier_1)[2] = "variety"
names(fichier_1)[4] = "row_spacing"
names(fichier_1)[8] = "planting_date"
names(fichier_1)[7] = "real_depth"
names(fichier_1)[6] = "theoritical_depth"
names(fichier_1)[9] = "period_of_analysis"

first = read_excel("/mnt/data/france_tensiometer_2025/TENSIOMETERS_POURSIUGUES_2025_SSC6_100.xlsx",sheet=1,skip=3)

first$`RR W700196` = NULL

first_long = first %>% gather(trait,value,2:13)

unique(first_long$trait)

first_long = first_long %>% separate(trait, into=c("obs","id","depth"),sep=" ",remove=F)
first_long = first_long %>% separate(depth, into=c("real_depth","unit"),sep="c",remove=F)
first_long$unit = NULL

first_long = first_long %>% unite(id_depth, id, real_depth,sep="__",remove=F)

fichier_1 = fichier_1 %>% unite(id_depth, tensiometer_id, theoritical_depth,sep="__",remove=F)

first_long = merge(first_long,fichier_1,by="id_depth")

first_long = first_long %>% mutate(system= paste(variety, density, "(x1000 plt/ha)",row_spacing,"cm",sep=" "))


first_long$dat = as.Date(first_long$Date)

first_long = first_long %>% unite(variety_real_depth, variety, real_depth.y ,sep="__",remove=F)

first_long = first_long %>% unite(trial_real_depth, trial, real_depth.y ,sep="__",remove=F)

first_long = first_long %>% unite(variety_rep, variety, id,sep="__",remove=F)


#second trial

second = read_excel("/mnt/data/france_tensiometer_2025/TENSIOMETERS_POURSIUGUES_2025_SSC7_75.xlsx",sheet=1,skip=3)

second$`RR W7001BC` = NULL

second_long = second %>% gather(trait,value,2:13)

unique(second_long$trait)

second_long = second_long %>% separate(trait, into=c("obs","id","depth"),sep=" ",remove=F)
second_long = second_long %>% separate(depth, into=c("real_depth","unit"),sep="c",remove=F)
second_long$unit = NULL

second_long = second_long %>% unite(id_depth, id, real_depth,sep="__",remove=F)

fichier_1 = fichier_1 %>% unite(id_depth, tensiometer_id, theoritical_depth,sep="__",remove=F)

second_long = merge(second_long,fichier_1,by="id_depth")

second_long = second_long %>% mutate(system= paste(variety, density, "(x1000 plt/ha)",row_spacing,"cm",sep=" "))


second_long$dat = as.Date(second_long$Date)

second_long = second_long %>% unite(variety_real_depth, variety, real_depth.y ,sep="__",remove=F)

second_long = second_long %>% unite(trial_real_depth, trial, real_depth.y ,sep="__",remove=F)

second_long = second_long %>% unite(variety_rep, variety, id,sep="__",remove=F)

first_long= rbind(first_long,second_long)

p <- ggplot(first_long, aes(x=as.Date(Date), y=value, color=variety_rep,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Tensiometer probes Hydric potential data dynamics")+facet_grid(as.integer(real_depth.x)~trial_real_depth,scales="free_y")
p

```





# Summarizing the HPOT values per replicate

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
sondes_data_long = first_long
sondes_data_long_summary = sondes_data_long %>% group_by(Date,dat,trial ,obs,variety,system,real_depth.x,trial_real_depth) %>% summarise(mean_value=mean(value))

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_long_summary, aes(x=as.Date(Date), y=mean_value, color=trial_real_depth,alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Tensiometer probes Hydric potential data dynamics - Mean value per rep")+facet_grid(as.integer(real_depth.x)~trial_real_depth,scales="free_y")
p

```




```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.width=10}
sondes_data_long_summary = sondes_data_long_summary %>% group_by(Date,trial_real_depth) %>% mutate(rep_no=row_number())

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_long_summary, aes(x=as.Date(Date), y=mean_value, color=as.factor(system ),alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Tensiometer probes Hydric potential data dynamics - Mean value per rep")+facet_grid(as.integer(real_depth.x)~trial_real_depth,scales="free_y")
p

```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE,fig.height=5, fig.width=12}
sondes_data_long_summary = sondes_data_long_summary %>% mutate(system_rep=paste(system,"_rep",rep_no,sep=""))

sondes_data_long_summary = sondes_data_long_summary %>% mutate(soil_depth = ifelse(trial_real_depth %in% c("SSC7 (75)__30","SSC6 (100)__30"),30,60))


#sondes_data_long_summary = sondes_data_long_summary %>% group_by(Date,trial_real_depth) %>% mutate(rep_no=row_number())

p <- ggplot(sondes_data_long_summary, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=mean_value, color=as.factor(system_rep),alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_line() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Tensiometer probes Hydric potential data dynamics - Mean value per rep")+facet_grid(soil_depth~trial,scales="free_y")
#p
plotly::ggplotly(p)


p <- ggplot(sondes_data_long_summary, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=mean_value, color=as.factor(system_rep),alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_smooth() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Tensiometer probes Hydric potential data dynamics - Mean value per rep")+facet_grid(soil_depth~trial,scales="free_y")+geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.Date(c("2024-08-15","2024-08-26"))), 
             color = "red", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3)+geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.Date(c("2024-09-15","2024-09-21"))), 
               color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3)
#p
plotly::ggplotly(p)
```

# Statistical analysis - Comparison of HPOT values of Tall vs SSC in stress periods


**Step 1**:-  Outlier detection using linear fixed effect model with hybrid as the fixed factor
Studentized residual threshold :- +-3.5

**Step 2**:- Statistical modelling and inference using linear fixed effect model with hybrid as the fixed factor

 

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
###Function which flags plot values with DSR > threshold for DSR traits 
data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location = function(dataset, dsr.threshold){
  outlier.df = NULL
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
  #dataset$id = seq(1,dim(dataset)[1],1)
    #print(traits[i])
  ## Subsetting only for the DSR trait
    temp = dataset %>% filter(type == traits[i])
    temp$row_number=rownames(temp)
  ## Subsetting based on missing data
    #temp = temp[temp$MissingDataFlag==FALSE,]
  
  ## Fitting the simple model
     model = lmer(value ~ as.factor(variety)  + (1|id),data=temp)
  
  
  ## Calculating Studentized residuals, and taking absolute values
    Stud.Residual = abs(stats::rstudent(model))
    #print(length(Stud.Residual))
  ## Appending DSR values to the existing table
    sr.df=as.data.frame(Stud.Residual)
    sr.df$row_number=rownames(sr.df)
    temp = temp%>% left_join(sr.df)
    #temp = as.data.frame(cbind(temp,Stud.Residual))
    temp$trait = traits[i]
  
  ## Flagging DSR outlier based on threshold
    temp$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag = ifelse(abs(temp$Stud.Residual)>dsr.threshold,TRUE,FALSE)
  
  ## Merging with original dataset
  #temp = temp[,c("id","Stud.Residual","DSR_outlier_flag")]
  #dataset1 = merge(dataset,temp,by = "id", all.x = TRUE)
  #dataset1 = dataset1[,-1]
  outlier.df = rbind(outlier.df,temp)
  }
  return(outlier.df)
}




#across location

across_location = function(data_df_long){
  traits = unique(data_df_long$trait)
  analysis_type="Across locations"
  means.df = NULL
  anova.df=NULL
  delta_table = NULL
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
    #print(traits[i])
    temp = filter(data_df_long, type == traits[i])
    #temp = filter(data_df_long, trait == traits[i])
    #temp_wide=temp %>% spread(trait, value)
   model = lmer(value ~ irrigation_percent  * hybrid_interrow_width_cm + (1|Location/Replicate)+ (1|Location:irrigation_percent)+ +(1|Location:irrigation_percent:hybrid_interrow_width_cm) ,data=temp)
    anova_table= create_anova_table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
    anova_table$Field = NULL
    anova_table$Trait= traits[i]
     anova_table$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$Location))
      #means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm.df)
      #anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anova_table)
      lsm.df = create_OneFactor_lsmeans_table_new(model, temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      lsm.df$Field = NULL
    lsm.df$Trait= traits[i]
     lsm.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$Location))
      #lsm.df$Field = traits[i]
      #anova_table= create_anova_table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm.df)
      anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anova_table)
      delta.df = create_OneFactor_Contrast_Table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      delta.df$Field = NULL
    delta.df$Trait= traits[i]
    delta.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$Location))
      delta_table = rbind(delta_table,delta.df)
  }
  
return(list(means.df,anova.df,delta_table))
}

create_OneFactor_lsmeans_table_new = function(model,test.set,field,analysis_type){
  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~irrigation_percent:hybrid_interrow_width_cm)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  #Factor = rep("Treatment1",dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$Protocol),dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  #Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(lsm1.df)[1])
  names(lsm1.df)[1] = "Level"
  #print(names(lsm1.df))
  lsm1.df = data.frame(lsm1.df$Level,lsm1.df$hybrid_interrow_width_cm,lsm1.df$lsmean,lsm1.df$SE,lsm1.df$df,lsm1.df$lower.CL,lsm1.df$upper.CL,lsm1.df$.group)
  names(lsm1.df) = c("Factor","Group1","lsmean","SE","DF","Lower_CI","Upper_CI","Group")
  lsm1.df$Field = field
  lsm1.df$analysis_type=analysis_type
  lsm1.df= lsm1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  return(lsm1.df)
}

create_anova_table_new = function(model,test.set, field,analysis_type){
  anv = as.data.frame(anova(model))
  Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(model)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
  anv$Field = field
  anv$analysis_type = analysis_type
  
anv = anv %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(`Pr(>F)`<0.05, "Significant","Not significant"))
#https://davidgohel.github.io/flextable/articles/format.html
#print(names(anv))
anv = anv[c(9,10,2,3,5:8,11)]
 # anova.table$Num.Fields = n.fields
#  anova.table$Trait = trait.name
  #colnames(anova.table) = c("Protocol","Effect","numDF","denDF","F-value","P-value","CV")
  #anv$field=field
  
  return(anv)
}


create_OneFactor_Contrast_Table_new = function(model,test.set, field,analysis_type){
  lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~irrigation_percent:hybrid_interrow_width_cm)
  delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  Factor = rep("Treatment1",dim(delta1.df)[1])
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(delta1.df)[1])
  #Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(delta1.df)[1])
  
  ## separating contrast column to treatment 1 and treatment 2
  
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
  ## Parsing the Contrast column and generating the first and second columns
  # contrast.rcbd = as.character(delta1.df$contrast)
  # V1 = character(length = dim(delta1.df)[1])
  # V2 = character(length = dim(delta1.df)[1])
  # for(j in 1:dim(delta1.df)[1]){
  #   contrast.part = strsplit(contrast.rcbd[j]," - ")
  #   V1[j] = contrast.part[[1]][1]
  #   V2[j] = contrast.part[[1]][2]
  # }
  # delta1.df = data.frame(Protocol,Set,Factor,V1,V2,delta1.df$estimate,delta1.df$p.value) 
  # delta1.df$sig.1 = ifelse(delta1.df$delta1.df.p.value<0.1,TRUE,FALSE)
  # names(delta1.df) = c("Protocol","Set","Factor","V1","V2","Diff","Pvalue","Sig_At_10percent")
  #delta1.df$Observation = field
  delta1.df$Field=field
  delta1.df$analysis_type = analysis_type
  return(delta1.df)
}

# ssc_data_model = ssc_data_all[,c(1:14,32,39,44:47,52)]
# ssc_data_model = filter(ssc_data_model, country=="greece")
# #ssc_data_model_1 = filter(ssc_data_model, )
# ssc_data_long = ssc_data_model%>% gather(type, value, 14:20)
# ssc_data_long = filter(ssc_data_long,type!="yield_t_per_ha")
# ssc_data_long = filter(ssc_data_long, !is.na(value))
# ssc_data_long$value = as.double(ssc_data_long$value )
# traits = unique(ssc_data_long$type)
# all_locations = unique(ssc_data_all$Location)
# ssc_data_outlier = data.frame()
#   for (i in 1:length(all_locations)){
#   
#   outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(ssc_data_long,3.5)
#   table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)
#   ssc_data_outlier = rbind(ssc_data_outlier,outlier_data )
#   }

by_location_analysis = function(data_df_long){
  #traits = unique(data_df_long$trait)
  #data_df_long$rep = as.factor(data_df_long$rep)
traits= unique(data_df_long$type)
 
  analysis_type="Across location"
  means.df = NULL
  anova.df=NULL
  delta_table = NULL
  for(i in 1:length(traits)){
    #print(traits[i])
    temp = filter(data_df_long, trait == traits[i])
    temp = filter(temp, value!="NA")
    #print(dim(temp))
    #temp = filter(data_df_long, trait == traits[i])
    #temp_wide=temp %>% spread(trait, value)
     # model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ productName+ (1|unique_location_name), data = temp)
 mmod = lmer(value ~ as.factor(variety) + (1|id),data=temp)
     
anv = as.data.frame(anova(mmod))
  #Protocol = rep(unique(test.set$PROTOCOL),dim(anv)[1])
 # Set = rep(unique(test.set$SET),dim(anv)[1])
  #Effect = row.names(anv)
  #anova.table = data.frame(Protocol,Effect,anv[,2:dim(anv)[2]])
  anv$CV = sjstats::cv(mmod)*100
  #anv$marginal_rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(model)[1],2)
  #anv$rsquared = round(MuMIn::r.squaredGLMM(mmod)[2],2)
  anv= anv %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 3)
  anv = anv %>% mutate(pvalue= format.pval(`Pr(>F)`,digits=2, eps=0.001, nsmall=3))
      
    #anova_table$Field = NULL
    anv$Trait= traits[i]
     #nova_table$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$municipality))
     #print(head(anova_table))
      #means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm.df)
      anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anv)
      #View(anova.df)
 lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~variety)  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  
  lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="tukey")
  
  lsm1.df = as.data.frame(lsm1.df)      #lsm.df = create_TwoFactor_lsmeans_table(model, temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      #
     # lsm.df$Field = NULL
    lsm1.df$Trait= traits[i]
    # lsm.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$municipality))
      #lsm.df$Field = traits[i]
      #anova_table= create_anova_table_new(model,temp,traits[i],analysis_type)
      means.df = rbind(means.df,lsm1.df)
      #anova.df=rbind(anova.df,anova_table)
      delta1 = emmeans::contrast(lsm1,method="pairwise")
  delta1.df = as.data.frame(summary(delta1,adjust="Tukey"))
  delta1.df= delta1.df %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 2)
  delta1.df = delta1.df %>% mutate(Significance=ifelse(p.value<0.05, "Significant", ifelse(p.value >= 0.05 & p.value<0.1,"Significant","Not significant")))
      #delta.df$Field = NULL
    delta1.df$Trait= traits[i]
    #delta.df$number_of_trials= length(unique(data_df_long$municipality))
      delta_table = rbind(delta_table,delta1.df)
  }
  
return(list(means.df,anova.df,delta_table))
}


 
 
  
  #lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(mmod,~Irrigation:interrow_width)  


```






```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,eval=F}
## 16th July to 16th September
model_data = filter(first_long, dat>="2025-07-16")
model_data = filter(model_data, dat<="2025-09-16")

model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(trial_real_depth,variety,system,id) %>% summarise(value=mean(value,na.rm=T))

model_data_summary = model_data_summary %>% group_by(trial_real_depth,variety,system) %>% mutate(rep=row_number())

traits = unique(model_data_summary$trial_real_depth)
model_data_summary$type=model_data_summary$trial_real_depth
model_data_summary$value = as.double(model_data_summary$value )
model_data_summary$variety = as.factor(model_data_summary$variety )
model_data_summary$id = as.factor(model_data_summary$rep )

DT::datatable(model_data_summary, filter="top")

#model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data_summary,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=7, fig.width=7,eval=F}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$variety = as.factor(ssc_data$variety)

ssc_data$id  = as.factor(ssc_data$id  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( variety,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(variety)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = variety), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Hydric Potential (KPa)")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = 5, group = variety), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+facet_wrap(~Trait,scales="free_x")+ggtitle("Comparison of Hydric Potential (KPa) : Stress Phase 1 - 15th to 26th August")
plot_lsmeans

#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

#contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)

DT::datatable(lsmeans_results, filter="top")

DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```

## SS6 (100) Location


Trial	Stress phases  
SSC6 (100)	July 4th to July 13th  
SSC6 (100)	July 17th to July 23th   
SSC6 (100)	August 4th to August 20th    
SSC6 (100)	August 22th to Sept 8th 


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=5, fig.width=12}

sondes_data_long_summary_1 = filter(sondes_data_long_summary, trial=="SSC6 (100)")
p <- ggplot(sondes_data_long_summary_1, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=mean_value, color=as.factor(system_rep),alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_smooth() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Tensiometer probes Hydric potential data dynamics - Mean value per rep")+facet_grid(soil_depth~trial,scales="free_y")+geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.Date(c("2025-07-04","2025-07-13"))), 
             color = "red", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3)+geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.Date(c("2025-07-17","2025-07-23"))), 
             color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3) +geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.Date(c("2025-08-04","2025-08-20"))), 
             color = "black", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3)+geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.Date(c("2025-08-22","2025-09-08"))), 
             color = "green", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3)
#p
plotly::ggplotly(p)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=7, fig.width=7}
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+facet_wrap(~Trait,scales="free_x")+ggtitle("Comparison of Hydric Potential: July 4th to July 13th")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data_summary = model_data_summary %>% group_by(trial_real_depth,variety,system) %>% mutate(rep=row_number())

traits = unique(model_data_summary$trial_real_depth)
model_data_summary$type=model_data_summary$trial_real_depth
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}

sondes_data_long_1 = filter(sondes_data_long, trial=="SSC6 (100)")

model_data = filter(sondes_data_long_1, dat>="2025-08-04")
model_data = filter(model_data, dat<="2025-08-20")

model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(trial_real_depth,variety,system,id) %>% summarise(value=mean(value,na.rm=T))

model_data_summary = model_data_summary %>% group_by(trial_real_depth,variety,system) %>% mutate(rep=row_number())

traits = unique(model_data_summary$trial_real_depth)
model_data_summary$type=model_data_summary$trial_real_depth
model_data_summary$value = as.double(model_data_summary$value )
model_data_summary$variety = as.factor(model_data_summary$variety )
model_data_summary$id = as.factor(model_data_summary$rep )
DT::datatable(model_data_summary, filter="top")
#model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data_summary,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

#DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=7, fig.width=7}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$variety = as.factor(ssc_data$variety)

ssc_data$id  = as.factor(ssc_data$id  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( variety,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(variety)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = variety), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Hydric Potential (KPa)")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = 5, group = variety), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+facet_wrap(~Trait,scales="free_x")+ggtitle("Comparison of Hydric Potential - August 4th to August 20th")
plot_lsmeans
ssc6_3 = plot_lsmeans
#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

#contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)

DT::datatable(lsmeans_results, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```


### August 22nd to September 8th



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}

sondes_data_long_1 = filter(sondes_data_long, trial=="SSC6 (100)")

model_data = filter(sondes_data_long_1, dat>="2025-08-22")
model_data = filter(model_data, dat<="2025-09-08")

model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(trial_real_depth,variety,system,id) %>% summarise(value=mean(value,na.rm=T))

model_data_summary = model_data_summary %>% group_by(trial_real_depth,variety,system) %>% mutate(rep=row_number())

traits = unique(model_data_summary$trial_real_depth)
model_data_summary$type=model_data_summary$trial_real_depth
model_data_summary$value = as.double(model_data_summary$value )
model_data_summary$variety = as.factor(model_data_summary$variety )
model_data_summary$id = as.factor(model_data_summary$rep )
DT::datatable(model_data_summary, filter="top")
#model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data_summary,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

#DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=7, fig.width=7}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$variety = as.factor(ssc_data$variety)

ssc_data$id  = as.factor(ssc_data$id  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( variety,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(variety)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = variety), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Hydric Potential (KPa)")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = 5, group = variety), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+facet_wrap(~Trait,scales="free_x")+ggtitle("Comparison of Hydric Potential: August 22nd to September 8th")
plot_lsmeans
ssc6_4 = plot_lsmeans

#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

#contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)

DT::datatable(lsmeans_results, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```


### SSC6 (100) location - All stress phases

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=7, fig.width=7}
ssc6_1

ssc6_2

ssc6_3

ssc6_4
```


## SSC7 (75) Location


Trial	Stress phases  
SSC7 (75)	June 29th to July 22th  
SSC7 (75)	July 27th to August 28th  
SSC7 (75)	Sept 1st to Sept 15th  

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=5, fig.width=12}

sondes_data_long_summary_1 = filter(sondes_data_long_summary, trial=="SSC7 (75)")
p <- ggplot(sondes_data_long_summary_1, aes(x=as.Date(dat), y=mean_value, color=as.factor(system_rep),alpha=0.5)) +
  geom_smooth() + 
  xlab("")+ggtitle("Tensiometer probes Hydric potential data dynamics - Mean value per rep")+facet_grid(soil_depth~trial,scales="free_y")+geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.Date(c("2025-06-29","2025-07-22"))), 
             color = "red", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3)+geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.Date(c("2025-07-27","2025-08-28"))), 
             color = "blue", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3) +geom_vline(xintercept = as.numeric(as.Date(c("2025-09-01","2025-09-15"))), 
             color = "black", linetype = "dashed", size = 0.3)
#p
plotly::ggplotly(p)
```


### June 29th to July 22th



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}

sondes_data_long_1 = filter(sondes_data_long, trial=="SSC7 (75)")

model_data = filter(sondes_data_long_1, dat>="2025-06-29")
model_data = filter(model_data, dat<="2025-07-22")

model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(trial_real_depth,variety,system,id) %>% summarise(value=mean(value,na.rm=T))

model_data_summary = model_data_summary %>% group_by(trial_real_depth,variety,system) %>% mutate(rep=row_number())

traits = unique(model_data_summary$trial_real_depth)
model_data_summary$type=model_data_summary$trial_real_depth
model_data_summary$value = as.double(model_data_summary$value )
model_data_summary$variety = as.factor(model_data_summary$variety )
model_data_summary$id = as.factor(model_data_summary$rep )
DT::datatable(model_data_summary, filter="top")
#model_data = model_data %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")

outlier_data = data_with_model_outlier_check_by_location(model_data_summary,3)


table(outlier_data$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier = filter(outlier_data,DSR_by_location_outlier_flag==FALSE )
#table(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier$DSR_by_location_outlier_flag)

#DT::datatable(ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier, filter="top")

# model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(LOCATION,VARIETY,type,trait,replicate) %>% summarise(value= mean(value))
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1 = model_data_summary %>% filter(LOCATION== "ALMUDEVAR")
# 
# model_data_summary_loc1_trait1 = filter(model_data_summary_loc1, type=="Hydric potential (kPa) 30 cm")
# 
# model = lmerTest::lmer(value ~ VARIETY + (1|replicate), data = model_data_summary_loc1_trait1)
# 
# lsm1 = emmeans::lsmeans(model,~VARIETY)  
# library(multcompView)
#   lsm1.df = multcomp::cld(lsm1,alpha=0.1,Letters=LETTERS,sort=TRUE,adjust="none")
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=7, fig.width=7}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$variety = as.factor(ssc_data$variety)

ssc_data$id  = as.factor(ssc_data$id  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( variety,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(variety)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = variety), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Hydric Potential (KPa)")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = 5, group = variety), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+facet_wrap(~Trait,scales="free_x")+ggtitle("Comparison of Hydric Potential: June 29th to July 22th")
plot_lsmeans

ssc7_1 = plot_lsmeans
#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

#contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)

DT::datatable(lsmeans_results, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(trial_real_depth,variety,system,id) %>% summarise(value=mean(value,na.rm=T))

model_data_summary = model_data_summary %>% group_by(trial_real_depth,variety,system) %>% mutate(rep=row_number())
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=7, fig.width=7}
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)

pd <- position_dodge(0.1)

  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = variety), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Hydric Potential (KPa)")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = 5, group = variety), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+facet_wrap(~Trait,scales="free_x")+ggtitle("Comparison of Hydric Potential: July 27th to August 28th")
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F}
sondes_data_long_1 = filter(sondes_data_long, trial=="SSC7 (75)")

model_data = filter(sondes_data_long_1, dat>="2025-09-01")
model_data = filter(model_data, dat<="2025-09-15")

model_data_summary = model_data %>% group_by(trial_real_depth,variety,system,id) %>% summarise(value=mean(value,na.rm=T))

model_data_summary = model_data_summary %>% group_by(trial_real_depth,variety,system) %>% mutate(rep=row_number())

traits = unique(model_data_summary$trial_real_depth)
model_data_summary$type=model_data_summary$trial_real_depth
model_data_summary$value = as.double(model_data_summary$value )
model_data_summary$variety = as.factor(model_data_summary$variety )

```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=7, fig.width=7}


#only SSCs
  ssc_data=ssc_data_outlier_no_outlier
 


#ssc_data_no_nas_ssc = ssc_data_high_ye%>% filter(hybrid %in% c("EW6846"))
   library(multcompView)
ssc_data$variety = as.factor(ssc_data$variety)

ssc_data$id  = as.factor(ssc_data$id  )



#STANDART 100

mod_results=by_location_analysis(ssc_data) 
lsmeans_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[1])
anova_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[2])
contrast_results = as.data.frame(mod_results[3])

#ssc_hybrids = c("EW6846XKL1" ,"EW6015XKL1","EW6436XKL1","EW6650XKP1","EW6526XKL1","EW6846","EW6436")
 
#lsmeans_results = lsmeans_results %>% mutate(hybrid_type = ifelse(hybrid_name %in% ssc_hybrids, "ssc","tall"))

library(stringr)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results %>%
  mutate_if(is.character, str_trim)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.character), str_remove_all, pattern = fixed(" ")))
 
lsmeans_results_ps$Group = as.factor(lsmeans_results_ps$.group)
lsmeans_results_ps= lsmeans_results_ps %>% mutate_if(is.numeric, round, 1)
pd <- position_dodge(0.1)
plot_lsmeans=ggplot(lsmeans_results_ps,aes(reorder( variety,-lsmean),lsmean, fill=as.factor(variety)))+geom_bar(stat="identity",position="dodge")+xlab("Product")+ylab(" LSMeans")+
  #theme_classic() + 
  theme( axis.text = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.text.x = element_text( size = 10 ),
         axis.title = element_text( size = 10, face = "bold" ),strip.text = element_text(size = 13, face = 'bold') ) +
     geom_text(aes(label=lsmean,y = lsmean, group = variety), position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3)+ theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, vjust = 0.5, hjust=1))+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=lsmean-SE, ymax=lsmean+SE), width=.2,
                position=position_dodge(.9))+xlab("Factor")+ylab("lsmeans - Hydric Potential (KPa)")+geom_text(aes(label = Group, y = 5, group = variety), vjust = -0.9, 
            size = 3, position = position_dodge(width = 0.8))+xlab("Hybrid")+facet_wrap(~Trait,scales="free_x")+ggtitle("Comparison of Hydric Potential: Septmeber 1st to September 15th")
plot_lsmeans

ssc7_3 = plot_lsmeans
#DT::datatable(anova_results)
  #DT::datatable(lsmeans_results)
  
#plot_lsmeans_ssc_only(lsmeans_results)

#contrast_results = contrast_results%>% separate(contrast, into=c("SSC system 1","SSC system 2"), sep=" - ",remove=F)

DT::datatable(lsmeans_results, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(lsmeans_results_ps, filter="top")

#DT::datatable(contrast_results, filter="top")

```



### SSC7 (75) location - All stress phases

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=F,fig.height=7, fig.width=7}
ssc7_1

ssc7_2

ssc7_3
```
